title: Next.js route intelligence benchmark seed
prompt: Build a local project brain for a deterministic Next.js app-router fixture and report route, render, API, component, config, contract, confidence, and unknown coverage.

required_substrings: Returns an HTTP/API response from the route flow.
No source entry file was detected for this package script.

pass: The fixture produces deterministic Next.js app-router page, dynamic docs, layout, API, sitemap, robots, content-loader, component, and package-script evidence.
flow_understanding.json preserves API route contracts, UI render script flow, mapped files/components/config surfaces, confidence gaps, and known unknowns without provider calls.
Mission Control report output exposes flagship object labels and expandable details from local artifacts only.
fail: The benchmark depends on installing Next.js, contacting a provider, or using network access.
Next app-router page, dynamic route, API route, content loader, or component import evidence is omitted from research artifacts.
Mission Control loses object labels, expandable details, or local-only report constraints.
